name: Disco Hearts Wave Beach Chair White - Roller Rabbit x Target
description:
Get ready for your summer getaway with this Beach Chair from Roller Rabbit x Target. This beach chair features a steel frame with recycled polyester seat and back cushions for comfy seating. Weather resistant for lasting outdoor use, it can be spot cleaned or wiped clean as needed.

Beloved for their colorful prints and uplifting styles, Roller Rabbit adds more joy to any journey. Now, they’re joining Target to celebrate travel, friendship and togetherness in this limited-edition collection designed to inspire your ultimate spring adventure.
